title: microseris decipiens
intro: Microseris decipiens, also known as the false dandelion or desert dandelion, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and kidney stones. Microseris decipiens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and its roots and leaves can also be used in traditional folk medicine.
